open_threads: THE INTENTION-LATTICE / CITADEL MODEL (the session's biggest design, converged not cast). The shape Akien drew: an INTENTION lands in intentions/, forks into SUB-INTENTIONS (each with a why), which terminate in TICKETS; a ticket MOVES to where the code winds up and BECOMES the `history` (ticket and history are one object in two phases — flow, not two species); beside the code sit `state` (current) + `history` (the ex-ticket); the CODE is the source of truth; intentions/ keeps a THIN intention+why as an INDEX into the code, for FAST TRAVERSAL when comparing a new intention (Law 1 — don't re-derive the settled). Two owners of DIFFERENT KINDS, not one axis: the HARBOR (harbor_master) = things in MOTION, faces the machinery; the CITADEL (intentions/) = the lattice model we NAVIGATE, faces US — 'not the motors, the telegraph/handle to them'. Compile-not-author is SETTLED (Akien: 'built from the files'). The lattice is a GRAPH -> its fast-traversal is semantic (the `graph trees / embeddings` spine step doubles as the citadel's navigation engine — CC read). The web_server renders the HARBOR (devices in motion); the citadel renders the LATTICE (intent).

TWO LEVELS THAT DO NOT CONFLICT (Akien corrected CC's false 'tension'): DESIGN level = our chats (propose + reconcile INTENTIONS — 'slowly improving it' is a logical activity ON the intentions, the level above the data; 'the result of our chats'; the chats ARE the design work, tickets+code are precipitate — 'the learning loop is the primitive; artifacts precipitate'). OPERATIONAL level = the telegraph data, compiled FROM the intention files; represents/operates the machinery, isn't it; read + steered, NEVER hand-edited — no door to it except through a file + recompile (Law 4, 'no other door'), so drift-by-hand-edit is IMPOSSIBLE, not merely discouraged. This will EVENTUALLY BE AUTOMATED (Hex + igors reconciling at the intentions level).

HEX — Akien's Apple M1 Studio, online with ollama, is the REAL inference host behind inference_domain's injected `resolver` seam (built deliberately un-wired). Wiring it makes two hypotheses MEASURED: inference_domain becomes the sole path to Hex (retires the CLAUDE.md IOU 'inference host only via inference_domain' against a real host), and the compile-once cache becomes real economics (finite M1 cycles; metering spent-vs-avoided against Hex = the true Telos-1 measurement). 'Getting CC help' = local compute for the mechanical/parallel work; the FORMAL intention->ticket->build process is what makes work HANDOFF-ABLE to Hex/Haiku/igors. PROPOSED new /sorted completeness line: a ticket is done being cast when it is HANDOFF-ABLE (buildable by a hand that doesn't share the resolver's judgment). Naming world stays consistent (Hex the thinking-engine, igors the helpers — the UU quarry's Discworld).

STATE-MACHINE VOCABULARY bound this session (terms-discipline in action, Akien-driven): a sub-intention's TERMINAL REST is PROVED/LEARNING (the rest states); the WAITING-for-proof is the PROVEME SUMMONS ('come prove me'), still active — NOT a rest.
